rules.rule_text:
rule KeyBoy_Dropper
{
	meta:
		author = "Rapid7 Labs"
		reference = "https://community.rapid7.com/community/infosec/blog/2013/06/07/keyboy-targeted-attacks-against-vietnam-and-india"

	strings:
		$1 = "I am Admin"
		$2 = "I am User"
		$3 = "Run install success!"
		$4 = "Service install success!"
		$5 = "Something Error!"
		$6 = "Not Configed, Exiting"

	condition:
		all of them
}
